title: Error Recovery
description: LLM calls are wrapped with targeted recovery paths for token limits, prompt overflow, and transient provider errors.

steps.annotation: The normal path is still a regular model call.

steps.content: error=max_tokens -> escalate to 64000 without appending a fake user message
steps.annotation: Token exhaustion gets a continuation-aware recovery path.
Prompt overflow triggers compaction instead of blind retry.

steps.content: error=529 -> exponential backoff with jitter; repeated 529 -> fallback model
steps.annotation: Transient provider errors use backoff and model fallback.
After recovery succeeds, the agent continues the normal tool loop.
